normalized_title: State Planning Policy 1 - State Planning Framework
scope_summary: The overarching State Planning Policy made under section 26 of the Planning and Development Act 2005, applying to all land in Western Australia. It establishes the Western Australian Planning Framework, classifying all current WAPC instruments (State Planning Policies, regional and sub-regional strategies, operational policies, position statements and guidelines) and requiring the Commission and local governments to have due regard to them in scheme-making and decision-making. It contains no development standards itself; it sets the hierarchy and general principles for land use planning and development.

cross_references.cited: Statement of Planning Policy No. 1 (Variation No. 2) (superseded, Gazette No. 25 of 3 February 2006)
4.2 Activity Centres for Perth and Peel
